title: "misuse of aggregate" error if aggregate column from FROM subquery is used in correlated subquery
poc: SELECT ( SELECT y FROM t2 WHERE z = cnt ) FROM ( SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM t1 );
key_bug_features: aggregate column from FROM subquery in correlated subquery
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(y TEXT, z INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT (SELECT y FROM t2 WHERE z = cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t1);
